creator: zarychtam@plan-b.pwste.edu.pl
text:
(In reply to Graham Perrin from comment #1)
It has nothing with the net/wireguard-kmod port. The problem refers to the if_wg(4) MFCed to the stable/13 yesterday[1]. Unfortunately, I cannon remove decke@ from the list

[1] https://cgit.freebsd.org/src/commit/?h=stable/13&id=5ae69e2f10dacd750b0f0e9284fefcbe97eb0476
